privileged_info_summary: The task operates on the real-world based Bologna Pasubio scenario. Independent execution of the simulation sweep confirms that testing offsets from 0 to 120 in steps of 10 yields 13 data points. The optimal offset for the first traffic light (id 218) that minimizes the total vehicle waiting time is 0 (or its cycle equivalent, 90), resulting in a minimum total waiting time of exactly 1353898.0 seconds.
